title: Kenyan Fish Wrap
description: A flavorful and juicy wrap filled with fish, vegetables, and spices, inspired by Kenyan cuisine.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the fish fillet and cook for 3 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Add the finely chopped onion and cook for 2 minutes, or until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add the ferment-jang and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish seasoning, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Warm the corn husk wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cooked fish mixture onto the center of the wrap, and topping with shredded lettuce and diced tomato.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
